title: Qatar vs Ecuador - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
description: Qatar and Ecuador have met three times previously, all matches taking place in Qatar – their head-to-head record is perfectly balanced with one win each and one draw. title: Argentina vs Saudi Arabia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
description: Argentina are unbeaten in all four of their previous meetings with Saudi Arabia, with this the first meeting between the sides at the FIFA World Cup. title: England vs Iran - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
description: This will be the first ever encounter between England and Iran. The Islamic Republic have never beaten European opposition at the FIFA World Cup. England have qualified for the FIFA World Cup for the 16th time. It’s their seventh appearance in a row, their longest streak in the competition.

title: Belgium vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
description: This is the second meeting between Belgium and Morocco at the FIFA World Cup, with Belgium winning 1-0 in the other in the 1994 edition. Morocco won their last meeting with Belgium in all competitions, winning 4-1 in a friendly back in March 2008. They had lost their two games against the Belgians before this.

title: Spain vs Germany - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
description: This will be the fifth meeting between Spain and Germany at the FIFA World Cup, the joint-most that Spain have faced any side at the competition. They failed to win any of their first three against Germany but won the most recent encounter 1-0 in the 2010 semi-final en route to lifting the trophy. title: Brazil vs Serbia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
description: Brazil have won each of their two previous encounters with Serbia, including their group stage fixture at the last FIFA World Cup. The other was a 1-0 win in a friendly back in June 2014. Brazil are the only team to have taken part in every single FIFA World Cup since its original edition in 1930; this will be their 22nd appearance.

title: Tunisia vs France - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
description: France have never lost in four previous meetings with Tunisia, with this their first encounter since a 1-1 draw in May 2010. France have alternated between winning and losing in each of their five FIFA World Cup matches against African nations, beating Nigeria 2-0 in their last such match in 2014.

title: Portugal vs Ghana - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
description: Portugal and Ghana’s only previous encounter was in the group stages of the 2014 FIFA World Cup. Portugal won 2-1, with a Cristiano Ronaldo winning goal.
